requirements.rationale: The core concept is a community internet that can work locally.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall be local-first and shall remain useful without public internet access.
requirements.verification: architecture review and future offline functional tests

requirements.rationale: Homes, schools, libraries, and neighborhoods may use different devices and operating systems.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall be hardware- and software-agnostic at the core model level.

requirements.rationale: A laptop, server, Raspberry Pi, NAS, or school PC may perform similar roles.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall distinguish node roles from physical hardware types.

requirements.rationale: Prevents overclaiming true mesh behavior and clarifies trust boundaries.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall separate local portal, local services, peer links, replication, and optional public gateway exposure.

requirements.rationale: Gateway exposure changes the threat model.
requirements.statement: Public internet gateway exposure shall be optional and disabled by default.
requirements.verification: security review and future config tests

requirements.rationale: Makes the package reviewable without trusting narrative statements.
requirements.statement: The package shall include audit scripts for package shape, path length, document metadata, registries, and implementation-claim scanning.

requirements.rationale: Keeps evidence separate from controlled docs and source.
requirements.statement: Audit reports shall be generated under audit_reports/active and proof evidence under proof/.

requirements.rationale: Short-range phone/device workflows may need Bluetooth.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall support Bluetooth through an optional adapter profile.

requirements.rationale: Maintains integrity when files move, duplicate, or get reviewed.
requirements.statement: The file registry shall use stable IDs, content hashes, source attribution, timestamps, owner/source fields, paths, tags, review state, and visibility flags.
requirements.verification: schema review and future registry tests

requirements.rationale: Prevents file modification and supports backup/restore.
requirements.statement: Metadata shall remain separable from original files and shall be snapshot/export capable.

requirements.rationale: Supports rollback and accountability.
requirements.statement: Configuration changes shall create versioned snapshots and audit entries.

requirements.rationale: Deletion semantics matter in replicated systems.
requirements.statement: Destructive actions shall distinguish hide, local delete, cache purge, registry removal, tombstone, and takedown request.

requirements.rationale: Diagnostics must not leak private data.
requirements.statement: Support bundles shall redact sensitive values by default and shall declare what was included.

requirements.rationale: Users need clear explanations when a path fails.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall expose adapter status, dependency status, route decisions, queue depth, and recent communication faults in diagnostics.
requirements.verification: diagnostic registry and future UI test

requirements.rationale: Prevents uncontrolled documents and ambiguous references.
requirements.statement: Every controlled document shall have a unique document_id, revision, status, classification, and package_class metadata block.

requirements.rationale: Supports durable cross-referencing from requirements, tests, audits, and future code.
requirements.statement: Every controlled document shall use stable section identifiers in the form [SEC:DOC-ID::N].

requirements.rationale: Allows revision history and evidence without overwriting prior records.
requirements.statement: The package shall include active and archive areas for documents and audit reports.

requirements.rationale: Allows automated consistency checks.
requirements.statement: The package shall include a machine-readable document registry matching active controlled documents.

requirements.rationale: Prevents false readiness claims.
requirements.statement: The package shall state its package class and shall not claim implemented product behavior in a pre-code baseline.

requirements.rationale: Users should not have to solve internet dependency problems during setup.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall support offline dependency installation from a flash-drive wheelhouse.

requirements.rationale: Accessibility and troubleshooting require the UI to open first.
requirements.statement: The local configuration UI shall launch even when optional hardware/backbone libraries are missing.

requirements.rationale: Nearby devices need a high-bandwidth path.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall provide LAN/Wi-Fi HTTP transport for local high-bandwidth communication.

requirements.rationale: Meshtastic is a critical backbone for practical LoRa devices.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall provide first-class Meshtastic support for LoRa-capable deployments.

requirements.rationale: Reticulum is a general-purpose resilient backbone candidate.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall provide first-class Reticulum support for resilient mesh/backbone deployments.

requirements.rationale: LXMF provides message-layer behavior over Reticulum.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall provide LXMF support for Reticulum-based messaging.

requirements.rationale: First-run guided entry point for nontechnical users and admins. Output: Creates onboarding session and next-step checklist.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Start Here as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Checks Python, OS, permissions, disk, and network readiness. Output: Readiness report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Install Check as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Confirms package files, hashes, manifest, versions, and path lengths. Output: Integrity report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Package Verifier as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Creates local runtime folders and separates local state from source packages. Output: Runtime scaffold.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Runtime Setup as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Selects home, school, library, makerspace, neighborhood, or emergency preset. Output: Initial policy profile.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Profile Preset Selector as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Defines this machine as portal, storage, admin, gateway, client, peer, or hybrid. Output: Node role config.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Node Role Wizard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Creates local identities, admin accounts, and recovery artifacts. Output: Identity record.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Local Identity Wizard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Controls whether the user or node appears on the community web. Output: Visibility policy.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Visibility Wizard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Sets personal, household, student, staff, public-local, or organization privacy boundaries. Output: Privacy policy.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Privacy Wizard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Defines what may be shared, cached, copied, discovered, or published. Output: Sharing rules.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Sharing Policy Builder as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Engineers roles, groups, approvals, admin powers, and command boundaries. Output: Permission matrix.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Roles and Permissions Console as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Tests who can see or do what before policy changes are applied. Output: Simulation report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Policy Simulator as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Finds reachable devices, peers, services, storage nodes, and local interfaces. Output: Device inventory.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Device Discovery Tool as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Adds router, PC, Pi, NAS, server, peer node, gateway, or storage device. Output: Device record.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Add Device Wizard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Guides LAN, Wi-Fi, ad hoc, static IP, hostname, and service-discovery setup. Output: Network config.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Network Setup Assistant as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Adds peer links and verifies connectivity without assuming one transport. Output: Link records.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Mesh and Peer Link Assistant as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Configures optional public-internet bridge, firewall, and exposure rules. Output: Gateway policy.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Gateway Boundary Tool as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Enables local portal, file registry, directory, forum, wiki, search, and diagnostics services. Output: Service config.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Service Manager as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Scans selected folders and builds the local registry without publishing by default. Output: File index.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the File Registry Builder as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Imports files from flash drives or local folders and records provenance. Output: Import log.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Content Import Tool as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Adds tags, descriptions, audience, owner, review status, and visibility flags. Output: Metadata records.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Metadata Tagger as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Supports review states, restrictions, block decisions, and accountability. Output: Review decisions.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Review and Moderation Queue as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Publishes only approved public-local or peer-visible entries. Output: Directory records.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Community Directory Publisher as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Creates, verifies, and restores configuration, registry, and content backups. Output: Backup set.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Backup and Restore Tool as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Controls which content is cached where and under what trust rules. Output: Replication policy.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Sync and Replication Planner as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Shows capacity, cache health, replication state, and stale content. Output: Storage report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Storage Steward Tool as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Shows service health, network status, registry status, sync state, and errors. Output: Health report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Diagnostics Dashboard as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Reviews changes, approvals, failures, policy changes, and exports. Output: Audit view.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Audit Log Viewer as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Guides passwords, firewall, local exposure, admin hygiene, and backups. Output: Security report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Security Hardening Checklist as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Applies future CommNet packages while preserving runtime state. Output: Update report.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Update and Package Installer as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Creates a redacted diagnostic bundle for troubleshooting. Output: Support bundle.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Export Support Bundle as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Opens the local community portal for browsing, search, and local services. Output: Portal session.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Community Web Launcher as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Opens the powerful configuration platform for owners and admins. Output: Admin session.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Admin Console Launcher as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Runs simulated walkthroughs without changing real settings. Output: Demo state.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Help and Demo Mode as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Configures local notices, emergency resources, and offline operation modes. Output: Emergency profile.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Emergency and Outage Mode Setup as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Creates or repairs clickable launchers relative to the extracted package. Output: Launcher icons.
requirements.statement: CommNet onboarding shall define the Shortcut and Icon Manager as a first-class setup or operations tool.

requirements.rationale: Prevents path length failures and tool incompatibility.
requirements.statement: Package paths should remain short enough for Windows extraction under C:\Users\iaq16\Documents\Code\CommNet.

requirements.rationale: Visibility must be intentional.
requirements.statement: A user or node shall not appear in the community directory unless visibility is explicitly enabled.

requirements.rationale: Prevents misunderstanding between local visibility and public internet exposure.
requirements.statement: Visibility labels shall distinguish private local, device-local, local-network, approved-peer, and gateway-exposed states.

requirements.rationale: Enables schools and communities to engineer repeatable configurations.
requirements.statement: Policy profiles shall be exportable, importable, and reviewable before apply.

requirements.rationale: UI-only restrictions are not security controls.
requirements.statement: All privacy and permission decisions shall be enforced by backend policy, not only by UI visibility.

requirements.rationale: Reduces accidental exposure during onboarding.
requirements.statement: Default setup shall be private, local-only, invisible, and non-sharing until the user explicitly changes it.

requirements.rationale: Supports both home and school deployments with one model.
requirements.statement: Role definitions shall distinguish visitor, user, contributor, moderator, administrator, auditor, guardian, and maintainer capabilities.

requirements.rationale: Local deployments need practical recovery without creating easy compromise paths.
requirements.statement: The system shall support recovery from lost admin access without silently bypassing ownership rules.

requirements.rationale: Reduces accidental exposure or lockout.
requirements.statement: High-impact actions shall require preview, confirmation, audit entry, and rollback path when practical.

requirements.rationale: Static and mobile caches are central to the community data-transfer concept.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall support custody-based store-and-forward bundles for storage nodes, phone caches, removable media, and future data-mule systems.

requirements.rationale: Prevents app logic from depending on one communication pathway.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall use a universal transport-adapter architecture.
requirements.verification: transport registry and adapter API review

requirements.rationale: Supports future Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, serial, storage, drone, and other pathways.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall allow new transport adapters without modifying application-layer community tools.

requirements.rationale: Different payloads have different bandwidth, privacy, urgency, and latency needs.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall classify all outbound payloads before route selection.

requirements.rationale: Route decisions must be explainable and auditable.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall use deterministic route planning based on policy, urgency, privacy, payload size, latency, reliability, and available adapters.

requirements.rationale: Maximizes delivery effort without resource exhaustion.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall use bounded queues, bounded retries, bounded worker threads, timeouts, rate limits, and circuit breakers.

requirements.rationale: Supports store-and-forward communication.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall persist undeliverable messages for deferred delivery when policy allows.
requirements.verification: future queue tests and route policy review

requirements.rationale: Supports diagnostics and accountability.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall audit route decisions, delivery attempts, failures, deferrals, drops, and successful deliveries.

requirements.rationale: Users starting from a flash drive need a clear next step.
requirements.statement: CommNet shall provide one obvious first-run entry point.

requirements.rationale: Home and school deployments need shared behavior with different defaults.
requirements.statement: Configuration tools shall share one common policy engine and differ by profile, not by incompatible implementations.

requirements.rationale: Powerful controls must not overwhelm first-time users.
requirements.statement: The admin configuration platform shall support novice and advanced modes.

requirements.rationale: Reduces dangerous configuration mistakes.
requirements.statement: The UI shall expose policy consequences before applying privacy, sharing, gateway, and role changes.

requirements.rationale: Carries forward proven project UI expectations.
requirements.statement: The UI design shall support dockable panels, persistent status, settings persistence, diagnostic export, and logs.

requirements.rationale: Browsing and configuration are different risk modes.
requirements.statement: The community web portal and admin console shall be separate entry points.
CommNet shall launch a local server with Python standard-library components in the shell package.
CommNet shall bind to 127.0.0.1 by default for this local demonstrator.
Launchers shall use relative paths and Python discovery rather than hard-coded install paths.
Shell diagnostics shall report runtime, SQLite, package, and transport skeleton status.
The shell package shall include the universal transport skeleton and a functional loopback adapter.
CommNet shall provide a browser-based first-run setup wizard.
CommNet shall persist node configuration in SQLite-compatible runtime state and JSON snapshots.
CommNet shall validate all user-editable configuration fields.
CommNet shall provide rollback to prior configuration snapshots.
CommNet shall export and import configuration JSON.
CommNet shall default to private/local-only visibility.
CommNet shall show current visibility state in admin and portal interfaces.
CommNet shall allow services to be enabled or disabled from the admin UI.
CommNet shall hide disabled services from the portal.
CommNet shall provide manual device registry management before automatic discovery is implemented.
CommNet shall allow users to define file registry roots without automatically publishing files.
CommNet package generation shall audit that prior active documentation has not disappeared.
CommNet shall provide a browser-accessible network dashboard.
CommNet shall support manual peer registration before automatic discovery is implemented.
CommNet shall provide a LAN HTTP handshake endpoint for reachable CommNet peers.
CommNet shall default inbound peer communication to disabled unless explicitly enabled.
CommNet shall provide bounded message queue and retry-limit defaults.
CommNet shall provide deterministic route-decision reports.
CommNet shall implement local loopback delivery.
CommNet shall implement LAN HTTP test-message delivery to manually configured reachable peers.
CommNet shall detect optional transport dependencies without requiring them for startup.
CommNet shall show missing transport dependencies in admin diagnostics.
CommNet shall audit route decisions and delivery attempts.
CommNet shall detect and list available network paths/interfaces.
CommNet shall classify APIPA/self-assigned 169.254.x.x addresses as invalid for normal visitor links.
CommNet shall let the user select the network path used for visitor links, share links, peer invites, and LAN setup guidance.
CommNet shall generate copyable links only from the selected valid network path unless explicitly overridden.
CommNet shall provide a real Catena USB serial adapter using pyserial when available.
CommNet shall distinguish local hardware ACK from remote RF delivery.
